text:
Once upon a gentle breeze in a faraway meadow, there lived a small, fluffy rabbit named Whisker who loved nothing more than to frolic among the wildflowers and bask in the sun's warm rays. Whisker was a creature of great kindness, always ready with a nibble of grass for his new friends or a cozy nest for those seeking shelter.

One sunny morning, as Whisker was nibbling on the dewy grass, he noticed a tiny, delicate butterfly struggling to fly. The butterfly's wings were stained with the sticky sap from a nearby tree, and it couldn't seem to break free. Whisker, with his nimble paws, gently plucked the sap from the butterfly's wings and helped it take flight once again.

The grateful butterfly, whose name was Luminos, thanked Whisker profusely. Luminos, with her vibrant colors, promised to light up the world for Whisker whenever he needed her. And
